MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Sojurn Properties is present. Represented by Mr. Mario.
Attorney David Brillant appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Steven Leoni is present.
Attorney Sean Bockover representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Quidachay, litigants and counsel confer privately chambers, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
